proposal.hypothesis: The first domain-randomized residual improved one held-out plant but saw only twenty complete episodes; doubling PPO samples should improve coverage and reduce seed-specific underfitting without increasing residual authority.
proposal.expectedEffect: Improve heavy/weak survival or forward displacement while retaining the light/strong gain and all upright and motion-quality gates.

gateReasons: light-strong: forward-progress regressed from passing to failing
light-strong: signed-forward-progress regressed from passing to failing
light-strong: backward-displacement regressed from passing to failing
light-strong: planar-velocity-tracking regressed from passing to failing
